flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at University of California-Irvine rose 24% between 2007 and 2010 ($10.5k → $13.0k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of California-Irvine rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($43.5k → $49.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of California-Irvine rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($13.8k → $15.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of California-Irvine fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
